raw_response: {"ambiguities":[],"assumptions":["n : Nat"],"conclusion":"0 + n = n","informal_statement":"For every natural number `n`, adding zero on the left gives back `n`.\n\nTarget statement: `0 + n = n`.","paraphrase":"For every natural number n, adding zero on the left returns n.","symbols":["0","+","Nat"],"title":"Zero-add on natural numbers"}
